title: Instrument d'adhésion
text_preview: REPUBLIC OF BOTSWANA INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION CONVENTION RELATING TO INTERNATIONAL EXHIBITIONS WHEREAS the Convention Relating to International Exhibitions was signed at Paris on 22nd November 1928; AND WHEREAS the said Convention was supplemented by the Protocols of 10t May 1948, 16th November 1966, and 30th November 1972, the Amendment of 24'h June 1982, and the Amendment of 31st May 1988; AND WHEREAS the said Conv…

pages.text:
REPUBLIC OF BOTSWANA

NOW THEREFORE, I, DR. MOKGWEETSI ERIC KEABETSWE MASISI, President of the

Republic of Botswana, for and on behalf of the Republic of Botswana hereby accede to the -

CONVENTION RELATING TO INTERNATIONAL EXHIBITIONS

IN TESTIMONY WHEREOF, I have caused the Public Seal of the Republic of Botswana to be hereunto affixed.

Zoth

DONE AT GABORONE, BOTSWANA this ..

... day of March, in the year of our Lord

Two Thousand and Twenty-Three.

ONa

DR. MOKGWEETSI ERIC KEABETSWE MASISI

PRESIDENT

ADVOCATE ABRAHAM M. KEETSHABE

CUSTODIAN OF THE PUBLIC SEAL

TO: The Government of France

France
